docs_pages.title: Install Zenith CLI
docs_pages.description: Install the CLI and create your first project.
docs_pages.mdx:
# Installation

Use npm to run Zenith commands.

```bash
npx zenith dev
```

## Next step

Open [the blog](/blog) for release updates.

docs_pages.title: Routing Guide
docs_pages.description: How file-based routes map to URLs.
docs_pages.mdx:
# Routing

Routes are mapped from `src/pages`.

- `index.zen` maps to `/`
- `blog/index.zen` maps to `/blog`
- `blog/[slug].zen` maps to `/blog/:slug`

posts.title: Hello Zenith
posts.description: A quick update from the CMS pipeline.
posts.content:
Hello Zenith

This post is rendered on the server from CMS content.

const status = "stable";
